# Old Cemetery

## Theme

An abandoned cemetery controlled by a powerful necromancer.

The dead do not stay buried.

## Biome Gameplay

Old Cemetery teaches:

- fighting summoned enemies
- avoiding ghost pressure
- target priority
- controlling enemy numbers

Rule:
Undead enemies are simple alone, but become dangerous when the Necromancer keeps raising more of them.

---

# Skeleton

## Role
Fast Melee

## Difficulty
Easy

## Description
Fragile undead warrior.

## AI
- Runs directly toward the player.
- Attacks immediately.
- Very low HP.

## Basic Attack
Bone Slash

## Ability
None

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Death

---

# Zombie

## Role
Slow Tank

## Difficulty
Easy / Medium

## Description
Slow but durable undead.

## AI
- Slowly walks toward the player.
- Blocks space.
- Soaks damage.

## Basic Attack
Rotten Swipe

## Ability
Rotten Touch

Applies weak poison / disease damage over time.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Attack
- Death

---

# Ghost

## Role
Ethereal Harasser

## Difficulty
Medium

## Description
Floating spirit that pressures the player from range.

## AI
- Keeps distance.
- Moves through enemies.
- Attacks with ghost projectiles.

## Basic Attack
Soul Bolt

## Ability
Ethereal Shift

Briefly becomes harder to hit.

Effects:
- reduced damage taken
- passes through units

## Required Animations
- Idle / Hover
- Fly
- Cast
- Death

---

# Necromancer

## Role
Biome Boss

## Difficulty
Boss

## Description
Master of the Old Cemetery.

Wins by summoning undead and overwhelming the player.

## Basic Attack
Soul Bolt

## Ability 1
Raise Skeletons

Summons 2–3 Skeletons.

## Ability 2
Soul Explosion

Marks one summoned Skeleton.

After a short delay, it explodes.

## Ability 3
Ghost Prison

Summons slow-moving spirits.

If they touch the player:
- Slow
- small damage over time

## Phase 2
Triggered at 50% HP.

- summons more often
- raises more Skeletons

## Phase 3
Triggered at 25% HP.

- casts faster
- summons continuously
- becomes more aggressive

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Cast
- Summon
- Roar
- Death

## VFX
- green soul fire
- ghost projectiles
- summon circles
- bone particles
- cemetery fog

## SFX
- bones rattling
- zombie groan
- ghost whisper
- necromancer chant
